## Breadcrumb

# Low-Income Housing Tax Credit (LIHTC) Program: Property Level Data

![Dataset Banner Image](/portal/sites/default/files/images/datasets/dataset_topbanner.jpg)

## Low-Income Housing Tax Credit (LIHTC) Program: Property Level Data

HUD's LIHTC database contains information on 55,345 projects and 3.9 million housing units placed in service between 1987 and 2024. Data for properties placed in service in 2025 will be collected in the fall of 2026 and added to this database in the spring of 2027. The database includes project address, number of units and low-income units, number of bedrooms, year the credit was allocated, year the project was placed in service, whether the project was new construction or rehab, type of credit provided, and other sources of project financing. The database has been geocoded, enabling researchers to look at the geographical distribution and neighborhood characteristics of tax credit projects. It may also help show how incentives to locate projects in low-income areas and other underserved markets are working. With the continued support of the national LIHTC database, HUD hopes to enable researchers to learn more about the effects of the tax credit program.

[LIHTC Property Data](/portal/datasets/lihtc/property.html)

[LIHTC Tenant Data](/portal/datasets/lihtc/tenant.html)

[Qualified Census Tract and Difficult Development Area Lists](/portal/datasets/qct.html)

[LIHTC Related Publications](/portal/datasets/LIHTC-related-publications.html)

All LIHTC data are available through the interactive system for accessing the LIHTC Database at [https://www.huduser.gov/lihtc/](/lihtc/). Users may select variables of interest, retrieve data on all projects in a particular State or group of States, restrict the search to projects with a particular characteristic or set of characteristics, select only projects in a particular city or county, or all projects within a user-selected radius of the center of a city.

Alternatively, you can download the entire database. The file, [LIHTCPUB.ZIP](/lihtc/lihtcpub.zip), is a ZIP archive file containing the following:

|  |  |  |  |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| LIHTC Data Dictionary 2024.PDF | The data dictionary for the LIHTC database (multiple address data use same formats) in Adobe Acrobat. || LIHTCPUB.ACCDB | The LIHTC Database in MS Access format. This file also includes building addresses from HUD’s LIHTC tenant data collection. |
||  |  |
| --- | --- |
| LIHTCPUB.CSV | The LIHTC Database in CSV format. |
|

See the data dictionary for the definitions of each variable.

***Missing Data***

Virtually all variables are missing in at least a few cases. Click **[here](/lihtc/missing.pdf)** for a list of missing data by year projects were placed in service.

**REVISIONS TO THE LIHTC DATABASE**

In late 1996, additional efforts were made to improve the coverage of the LIHTC database for earlier years of the
program. These efforts resulted in the addition of 1,989 projects containing 67,056 units to the database. When this
revision was first posted in October 1997, the text file LIHTCPUB.TXT containing the entire database was inadvertently
created without decimals (i.e., all numerical fields were integer only affecting the tract number, latitude, longitude,
and several census data fields). The Excel files were not so affected. The only effect of the January 1998 revision is to
correct this error in the LIHTCPUB.TXT file. The Excel files were not revised. Note that the report,
*[Development and Analysis of the
National Low-Income Housing Tax Credit Database](/portal/Datasets/lihtc/report.pdf)*, has NOT been revised to reflect the additional data.

In January 2001, data for **projects placed in service between 1995 and 1998 were added**. These projects are described
in the report *[Updating
the National Low-Income Housing Tax Credit Database](/portal/Datasets/lihtc/report9598.pdf)*. Except for some additional geocoding, there were no revisions
made to data for projects placed in service from 1987 through 1994.

In May 2002, data for **projects placed in service through 1999 were added**. This also included 319 projects and 25,000
units placed in service in 1998 and 44 projects and nearly 5,000 units placed in service in 1997 that were not included
in the previous update. Projects from all years (1987 through 1999) were geocoded to 1990 and 2000 Census geography. For
details see the report *[Updating
the National Low-Income Housing Tax Credit Database: Projects Placed in Service Through 1999](/portal/Datasets/lihtc/report9599.pdf)*.

In March 2003, data for **projects placed in service through 2000 were added**. This also included 44 projects and 2,123
units placed in service in 1998 and 76 projects and 4,865 units placed in service in 1999 that were not included
in the previous update. For details see the report *[Updating
the National Low-Income Housing Tax Credit Database: Projects Placed in Service Through 2000](/portal/Datasets/lihtc/report952k.pdf)*.

In May 2004, data for **projects placed in service through 2001 were added**. This also included 132 projects and 11,832
units placed in service between 1995 and 2000 that were not included in the previous updates. For details see the report
*[Updating the National Low-Income Housing
Tax Credit Database: Projects Placed in Service Through 2001](/portal/Datasets/lihtc/report9501.pdf)*.

In March 2005, data for **projects placed in service through 2002 were added**. This also included 102 projects and 8,823
units placed in service between 1995 and 2001 that were not included in the previous updates. For details see the report
*[Updating the National Low-Income Housing
Tax Credit Database: Projects Placed in Service Through 2002](/portal/Datasets/lihtc/report9502.pdf)*.

In March 2006, data for **projects placed in service through 2003 were added**. This also included extensive revisions
to data on projects placed in service in earlier years. This update was the first to include data from new survey questions
on project targeting, use of HUD subsidies in project financing, multiple address information for multi-building projects,and
continued monitoring of LIHTC-financed projects for program compliance. For details see the report
*[Updating the National Low-Income Housing
Tax Credit Database: Projects Placed in Service Through 2003](/portal/Datasets/lihtc/report9503.pdf)*.

In February 2007, data for **projects placed in service through 2004 were added**. This also included 151 projects and
12,452 units placed in service between 1995 and 2003 that were not included in the previous updates.
Due to funding restrictions, the annual report was not produced for the 2004 database update. For summary tables of the data,
see *[HUD National Low-Income Housing Tax
Credit Database: Projects Placed in Service Through 2004](/portal/Datasets/lihtc/tables9504.pdf)*.

In January 2008, data for **projects placed in service through 2005 were added**. This also included 150 projects and
10,863 units placed in service between 1995 and 2005 that were not included in the previous updates. Due to funding
restrictions, the annual report was not produced for the 2004 database update. For summary tables of the
data, see *[HUD's National
Low-Income Housing Tax Credit Database: Projects Placed in Service Through 2005](/portal/Datasets/lihtc/tables9505.pdf)*.

In April 2009, data for **projects placed in service through 2006 were added**. This also included 389 projects and
34,224 units placed in service between 1995 and 2005 that were not included in theprevious updates. This update was the first
to include data from new survey questions on amount of allocated tax credits, amounts of HUD subsidies in project financing,
information on elected set-asides,and the presence of project-based rental assitance.
For details see the report *[Updating
the National Low-Income Housing Tax Credit Database: Projects Placed in Service Through 2006](/portal/Datasets/lihtc/report9506.pdf)*.

In February 2010, data for **projects placed in service through 2007 were added**. This also included 618 projects and
58,650 units placed in service between 1995 and 2006 that were not included in the previous updates. Due to funding restrictions,
the annual report was not produced for the 2007 database update. For summary tables of the data,
see *[HUD's National Low-Income Housing Tax Credit Database: Projects Placed in Service Through 2007](/portal/Datasets/lihtc/tables9507.pdf)*.

In September 2011, data for **projects placed in service through 2009 were added**. This also included 501 projects and
41,519 units placed in service between 1995 and 2007 that were not included in the previous updates. For a summary of the data,
see *[New Low-Income Housing Tax Credit Property Data Available](/portal/Datasets/lihtc/topical9509.pdf)*.

In August 2012, data for **projects placed in service through 2010 were added**. This also includes a significant revision to the 2008 properties
to include properties previously unreported to HUD. For a summary of the data,
see *[HUD's National
Low-Income Housing Tax Credit Database: Projects Placed in Service Through 2010](/portal/Datasets/lihtc/tables9510.pdf)*.

In September 2013, data for **projects placed in service through 2011 were added**. This also included 424 projects and 25,758 units
placed in service between 1995 and 2010 that were not included in the previous updates. For a summary of the data,
see *[HUD's National
Low-Income Housing Tax Credit Database: Projects Placed in Service Through 2011](/portal/Datasets/lihtc/tables9511.pdf)*.

In May 2014, data for projects **placed in service through 2012 were added**. This also included 558 projects and 65,107 units
placed in service between 1987 and 2011 that were not included in the previous updates. For a summary of the data,
see *[HUD's National
Low-Income Housing Tax Credit Database: Projects Placed in Service Through 2012](/portal/Datasets/lihtc/tables9512.pdf)*.

In June 2015, data for **projects placed in service through 2013 were added**. This also included 1,312 projects and 117,313 units
placed in service between 1987 and 2012 that were not included in the previous updates. For a summary of the data,
see *[HUD's National
Low-Income Housing Tax Credit Database: Projects Placed in Service Through 2013](/portal/Datasets/lihtc/tables9513.pdf)*.

In May 2016, data for **projects placed in service through 2014 were added**. This also included 305 projects and 4,222 units
placed in service between 1987 and 2013 that were not included in the previous updates. For a summary of the data,
see *[HUD's National
Low-Income Housing Tax Credit Database: Projects Placed in Service Through 2014](/portal/Datasets/lihtc/tables9514.pdf)*.

In June 2017, data for **projects placed in service through 2015 were added**. This also included 1,686 projects and 108,635 units
placed in service between 1987 and 2014 that were not included in the previous updates. For a summary of the data,
see *[HUD's National
Low-Income Housing Tax Credit Database: Projects Placed in Service Through 2014](/portal/Datasets/lihtc/tables9515.pdf)*.

In May 2019, data for **projects placed in service through 2017 were added**. This also included 1,266 projects and 112,384 units placed in service between 1987 and 2016 that were not included in the previous updates. For a summary of the data, see *[HUD's National Low-Income Housing Tax Credit Database: Projects Placed in Service Through 2017.](/portal/Datasets/lihtc/tables9517.pdf)*

In June 2020, data for **projects placed in service through 2018 were added**. This also included 1,125 projects and 103,404 units placed in service between 1987 and 2017 that were not included in the previous updates. This update was the first to include data from new survey questions on whether a property was resyndicated, has an affordability period longer than 30 years, received National Housing Trust funds, received Qualified Opportunity Zone funds, was part of a RAD development, and, for properties no longer monitored for LIHTC compliance, the reason that the property is longer monitored. For a summary of the data, see *[HUD's National Low-Income Housing Tax Credit Database: Projects Placed in Service Through 2018.](/portal/sites/default/files/pdf/tables9518.pdf)*

In May 2021, data for **projects placed in service through 2019 were added**. This also included 1,223 projects and 106,729 units placed in service between 1987 and 2019 that were not included in the previous updates. For a summary of the data, see *[HUD's National Low-Income Housing Tax Credit Database: Projects Placed in Service Through 2019](/portal/Datasets/lihtc/LIHTC-2019-Tables.pdf)*.

In April 2022, data for **projects placed in service through 2020 were added**. This also included 668 projects and 108,826 units placed in service between 1987 and 2019 that were not included in the previous updates. For a summary of the data, see *[HUD's National Low-Income Housing Tax Credit Database: Projects Placed in Service Through 2020](/portal/Datasets/lihtc/LIHTC-2020-Tables.pdf)*.

In April 2023, data for **projects placed in service through 2021 were added**. This also included 755 projects and 54,803 units placed in service between 1987 and 2020 that were not included in the previous updates. For a summary of the data, see *[HUD's National Low-Income Housing Tax Credit Database: Projects Placed in Service Through 2021](/portal/Datasets/lihtc/LIHTC-2021-Tables.pdf)*.

In April 2024, data for **projects placed in service through 2022 were added**. This also included 435 projects and 35,814 units placed in service between 1987 and 2021 that were not included in the previous updates. For a summary of the data, see *[HUD's National Low-Income Housing Tax Credit Database: Projects Placed in Service Through 2022](/portal/Datasets/lihtc/LIHTC-2022-Tables.pdf)*.

In April 2025, data for **projects placed in service through 2023 were added**. This also included 534 projects and 45,830 units placed in service between 1987 and 2022 that were not included in the previous updates. For a summary of the data, see *[HUD's National Low-Income Housing Tax Credit Database: Projects Placed in Service Through 2023](/portal/Datasets/lihtc/LIHTC-2023-Tables.pdf)*.

In April 2026, data for **projects placed in service through 2024 were added**. This also included 577 projects and 45,830 units placed in service between 1987 and 2023 that were not included in the previous updates. For a summary of the data, see *[HUD's National Low-Income Housing Tax Credit Database: Projects Placed in Service Through 2024](/portal/Datasets/lihtc/LIHTC-2024-Tables.pdf)*.

![lihtc](/portal//sites/default/files/images2/LIHTC-ICON-02052022.png)

Use the Query Tool to access data from HUD's Low-Income Housing Tax Credit Database. <https://www.huduser.gov/lihtc/>

- [Updating the National Low-Income Housing Tax Credit Database: Projects Placed in Service Through 2002](/portal/datasets/lihtc/report9502.pdf)

If you have technical questions or problems using the LIHTC Database files, contact
[helpdesk@huduser.gov](mailto:helpdesk@huduser.gov?SUBJECT=LIHTC%20Database). Please include "LIHTC Database" in the "Subject" line.
